description: This file is an SCSS stylesheet that contains CSS reset, normalization, and base styling rules, including resets for typography, layout, forms, and other HTML elements, along with some conditional SCSS directives.

methods.name: font-size
methods.description: A SCSS mixin used to set font sizes conditionally.

methods.name: border-radius
methods.description: A SCSS mixin used to apply border-radius styling.
